description.value:
Frequency once per day

Trigger A creature you're aware of critically succeeds on a Strike against you and would deal damage to you

Effect You blink your big wet eyes at the triggering creature, forcing it to pull back on its attack. The attacking creature takes a circumstance penalty to the damage of the triggering Strike equal to your level + 2. This penalty applies after doubling the damage for a critical hit. The attacker is then immune to Big Wet Eye Blink for 24 hours.
